name: powershell-lsp
description: PowerShell code intelligence via PowerShell Editor Services (diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, find-references) for .ps1/.psm1/.psd1.

ps_host.title: PowerShell host executable
ps_host.description: Executable used to host PowerShell Editor Services. Use 'pwsh' (PowerShell 7+, recommended and tested) or 'powershell' (Windows PowerShell 5.1).

severityThreshold.title: Severity threshold
severityThreshold.description: Least-severe level to report: Error, Warning, Information, or Hint. 'Warning' reports Errors and Warnings only.

ruleInclude.title: Include rules (comma-separated)
ruleInclude.description: If set, report ONLY these PSScriptAnalyzer rule codes (e.g. 'PSUseApprovedVerbs,PSAvoidUsingCmdletAliases'). Empty = all.

ruleExclude.title: Exclude rules (comma-separated)
ruleExclude.description: PSScriptAnalyzer rule codes to suppress (e.g. 'PSAvoidUsingWriteHost'). Empty = none.

timeoutMs.title: Client hard cap (ms)
timeoutMs.description: Total time the PostToolUse client waits before degrading to log-only.

debounceMs.title: Debounce window (ms)
debounceMs.description: Edits landing within this window fold into one analysis pass.

keepLastN.title: Log files kept per family
keepLastN.description: SessionStart sweeps each rolling log family down to this many newest files.

idleTtlMin.title: Daemon idle TTL (minutes)
idleTtlMin.description: The daemon self-terminates after this long with no diagnostics request.

perFileCap.title: Max diagnostics per file
perFileCap.description: Cap the diagnostics reported per file; the rest collapse into an 'and N more' line. '0' = no cap.
